title: Free Music Distribution for Apple Music
metaTitle: Free Music Distribution for Apple Music | Distrozi Music Distribution
metaDescription: Read about Free Music Distribution for Apple Music. Learn how to distribute your music globally, protect copyrights, and maximize streaming royalties with Distrozi.
author: Distrozi Editorial Team

content.text: Navigating the digital music ecosystem requires a clear understanding of how distributors, stores, and registration agencies interact. Finding the best music distribution service is crucial to get your music on Spotify, Apple Music, and TikTok while keeping your master rights.
Below, we outline the leading platforms, structuring their pricing models, pros, cons, and explaining which types of artists or labels they fit best.
Modern alternative for labels and artists wanting direct local withdrawals and Content ID without heavy commissions.
Provides a flexible model with a 100% free tier (taking a small 15% split) delivering to all major DSPs globally.
Offers mobile-first catalog management and a basic free tier for emerging independent solo artists.
TikTok's native distributor, offering free uploads and direct promotional integrations within the ByteDance network.
Free distribution taking a 15% split, with strong marketing tools and play analytics.
Top Free Music Distribution Platforms Compared

faq.question: How long does it take for a song to go live on Spotify?
faq.answer: Delivery takes 24-48 hours. However, we suggest scheduling your release at least 14 days in advance to allow for playlist pitching.

faq.question: What is the difference between an ISRC code and a UPC code?
faq.answer: An ISRC code tracks streams and play metrics for individual songs, while a UPC code tracks sales metrics for the overall single or album release product.
